title: Payel Sau joins Deutsche Bank as Assistant Vice President - Legal
description: Payel Sau has joined Deutsche Bank as Assistant Vice President - Legal.Sau is a 2016 alumna of School of Law, KIIT University.She has a decade of experience in OTC derivatives documentation and financial regulatory matters within the investment banking industry. She specialises in negotiating and managing ISDA Master Agreements, Credit Support Annexes, clearing agreements and other complex trading documentation across both domestic and cross-border transactions.Sau also advises on legal and regu
